channel.title: CyberNetSec - Other
channel.description: Latest other threat intelligence - the last 10 articles

item.title: The AI Sword: Anthropic Model Demonstrates Hacking Prowess Surpassing Human Experts
item.description:
A new AI model from Anthropic, named Claude Mythos Preview, has demonstrated the ability to autonomously find and exploit software vulnerabilities at a scale and speed that surpasses most human security experts. The model has already been used to find thousands of high-severity flaws in major operat...

Severity: High

Categories: Threat Intelligence, Other

Read Full Article →

item.title: "WeedHack" MaaS Targets Minecraft Players, Infecting 116,000+ Systems for Remote Access
item.description:
A Malware-as-a-Service (MaaS) operation known as "WeedHack" is aggressively targeting the Minecraft gaming community, having already infected over 116,000 systems. The malware, likely distributed through game mods or cheats, provides its operators with a web-based dashboard that gives them comprehen...

Severity: Medium

Categories: Malware, Threat Actor, Other

Read Full Article →

item.title: 29 Arrested as 'Operation KRATOS 2' Dismantles Nine Illegal Streaming Networks Across Europe
item.description:
A coordinated law enforcement action spanning 13 European countries, dubbed 'Operation KRATOS 2,' has successfully dismantled nine criminal networks specializing in illegal online streaming. The operation resulted in 29 arrests and the shutdown of services that provided illicit access to copyrighted...

Severity: Informational

Categories: Policy and Compliance, Other

Read Full Article →

item.title: Frame Security Launches with $50M to Combat AI-Powered Phishing and Deepfakes
item.description:
A new cybersecurity startup, Frame Security, has launched with $50 million in funding to tackle the growing threat of AI-powered social engineering. Founded by veterans of Wiz and Israel's Unit 8200, Frame is building a 'human risk security' platform. It uses AI to generate hyper-realistic attack si...

Severity: Informational

Categories: Phishing, Other, Threat Intelligence

Read Full Article →

item.title: Strategic Education Data Breach Exposes SSNs, Passports of Over 100,000
item.description:
Strategic Education, Inc., the parent company of Strayer University and Capella University, has disclosed a data breach that occurred in February 2026. The incident involved unauthorized access to its computer network, compromising the highly sensitive personal information of over 100,000 individual...

Severity: High

Categories: Data Breach, Other

Read Full Article →

item.title: Maine Accounting Firm Data Breach Exposes Sensitive Tax and Financial Data of 928 Clients
item.description:
The Maine-based accounting firm Edwards, Faust & Smith has disclosed a data breach affecting 928 clients. The incident, which occurred between February and May 2026, was initiated by a phishing email. The breach resulted in unauthorized access to highly sensitive data, including Social Security numb...

Severity: High

Categories: Data Breach, Phishing, Other

Read Full Article →

item.title: Alleged Iliad Italia Data Breach: Customer Data Reportedly for Sale on Dark Web
item.description:
An unconfirmed data breach has allegedly hit Iliad Italia, a major telecommunications provider in Italy. On May 27, 2026, a threat actor posted a dataset for sale on a dark web forum, claiming it contains customer records, device IMEI numbers, and account data from the carrier. Iliad Italia has not ...

Severity: Medium

Categories: Data Breach, Threat Intelligence, Other

Read Full Article →

item.title: Krispy Kreme Reaches $1.6M Settlement for 2024 Data Breach
item.description:
Krispy Kreme has agreed to a $1.6 million class-action settlement following a 2024 cyberattack that exposed customer data, including names, Social Security numbers, and financial account information. Under the settlement, customers who can document financial loss may receive up to $3,500, while othe...

Severity: Medium

Categories: Data Breach, Regulatory, Other

Read Full Article →

item.title: Gartner Names LinkShadow a 'Visionary' in 2026 Magic Quadrant for Network Detection and Response
item.description:
The technology research firm Gartner has positioned LinkShadow in the Visionaries Quadrant of its 2026 Magic Quadrant for Network Detection and Response (NDR). This recognition highlights LinkShadow's completeness of vision and ability to execute in the competitive NDR market. LinkShadow's strategy,...

Severity: Informational

Categories: Other, Security Operations, Threat Intelligence

Read Full Article →

item.title: OpenAI Launches 'Daybreak' to Automate Vulnerability Hunting with AI
item.description:
OpenAI has launched 'Daybreak,' a new cybersecurity initiative that uses its advanced AI models, including the new GPT-5.5-Cyber, to help organizations automatically find, validate, and remediate software vulnerabilities. Announced on May 12, 2026, the platform is a direct response to Anthropic's 'P...

Severity: Informational

Categories: Security Operations, Other

Read Full Article →
